hooks.command:
python -c "import sys, json; d = json.load(sys.stdin); f = (((d.get('tool_input') or {}).get('file_path')) or ((d.get('tool_response') or {}).get('filePath')) or '').replace('\\', '/');
print('run' if '/patient-wx-api-mysql/src/main/java/' in f else '')" | { read -r flag; if [ "$flag" = "run" ]; then mvn -f "patient-wx-api-mysql/pom.xml" -q -DskipTests compile; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
